detail.description: Tim Tawa singles on a line drive to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.
Tim Tawa doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Lars Nootbaar.
Tim Tawa homers (4) on a fly ball to left field.
Tim Tawa singles on a ground ball to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar, deflected by third baseman Kyle Karros.
Tim Tawa singles on a line drive to center fielder Drew Gilbert.
Tim Tawa singles on a ground ball to center fielder Harrison Bader. Ildemaro Vargas scores. Gabriel Moreno scores.
Tim Tawa singles on a ground ball to center fielder Myles Straw.
Tim Tawa doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Myles Straw. James McCann scores.
Tim Tawa doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.
Tim Tawa homers (3) on a fly ball to center field.
Tim Tawa hits a ground-rule double (5) on a line drive to left-center field. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd.
Tim Tawa doubles (4) on a ground ball to left fielder Teoscar Hernández. Gabriel Moreno scores.
Tim Tawa singles on a fly ball to center fielder Andy Pages.

pitches.callDescription: Wild pitch by pitcher Evan Phillips. Jorge Barrosa to 2nd.

detail.description: Tim Tawa singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Jorge Barrosa scores.
